waf.ipset.IPSetDescriptors.Docs: The IP address type (`IPV4` or `IPV6`) and the IP address range (in CIDR notation) that web requests originate from. If the `WebACL` is associated with an Amazon CloudFront distribution and the viewer did not use an HTTP proxy or a load balancer to send the request, this is the value of the c-ip field in the CloudFront access logs.

waf.ipset.Name.Docs: The name of the `IPSet`. You can't change the name of an `IPSet` after you create it.
